subcodes.title: Words to Drs. W. and W. Allen and Dr. J. Catton, spoken on 1912-10-21
subcodes.first_line: Diseases are of two kinds. There are some which are due to material cause, and such diseases should be treated according to material methods.
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @teleology; goal-directed motion, @power of prayer, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @Greatest Name
